en.text: You are not behind. You are on your own path.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: The student who feels heard can take one more step.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: Your worth is not your rank.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: Rest is not giving up. Rest is how you come back.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: Every expert was once a beginner who refused to quit.
en.author: Unknown

en.text: You have survived every hard day so far. That is your track record.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: Small steps taken consistently beat big leaps taken rarely.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: Asking for help is not weakness. It is the most intelligent thing you can do.
en.author: Manasitra

en.text: You do not have to solve everything today. One thing is enough.
en.author: Manasitra

hi.text: तू अकेला नहीं है। हम यहाँ हैं।
hi.author: मनसित्र

hi.text: तुम्हारी मेहनत कभी बेकार नहीं जाती।
hi.author: मनसित्र

hi.text: तुम्हारी कीमत तुम्हारे नंबरों से नहीं है।
hi.author: मनसित्र

hi.text: आराम करना हार नहीं है। यह वापसी की तैयारी है।
hi.author: मनसित्र

hi.text: हर विशेषज्ञ कभी शुरुआती था जिसने हार नहीं मानी।
hi.author: अज्ञात

hi.text: तुमने अब तक हर मुश्किल दिन पार किया है।
hi.author: मनसित्र

hi.text: मदद माँगना ताकत की निशानी है।
hi.author: मनसित्र

gu.text: તું એકલો નથી. અમે અહીં છીએ.
gu.author: મનસિત્ર

gu.text: આરામ કરવો હાર નથી. આ પાછા આવવાની તૈયારી છે.
gu.author: મનસિત્ર

gu.text: મદદ માગવી એ શક્તિની નિશાની છે.
gu.author: મનસિત્ર
